stemHtml:
Refer to figure or Jeppesen GSPRM Training Route Manual - Chart "E LO 1"
An aircraft is flying along airway Y904 from NANEV (N57º34'29", W002º27'14") to WICK VOR/DME (WIK, N58º27'32", W003º06'01"). Given the following data, the remaining fuel when arriving at WICK VOR/DME is:

Fuel over NANEV: 650 kg
TAS: 200 kt
Wind component: +17 kt
Fuel flow: 180 kg/h
